reviews.comment:
Soy socio.. cada vez menos personal y peor atención..  todo es un ritual se toman su tiempo..
El ACA cada vez peor

(Translated by Google)
I'm a member... fewer and fewer staff and worse service... everything is a ritual, they take their time... The ACA is getting worse and worse.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNSbHNYVlVnEAE

reviews.comment:
Básicamente si no quiere esperar sobre la avenida Cabildo trabando el tráfico, no lo atienden. Si está entre esta estación y otra, váyase sin dudarlo. No entiendo cómo los de tránsito no hacen nada. Además hay surtidores libres y no te ubican. Un desastre.

(Translated by Google)
Basically, if you don't want to wait on Cabildo Avenue, blocking traffic, they won't serve you. If you're between this station and another, leave without hesitation. I don't understand why the transit officers don't do anything. Besides, there are empty pumps, and they can't find you. A disaster.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNSNnV1dml3RRAB

reviews.comment:
no sé para q sigo yendo..... siempre tienen problemas con las formas de pago q no sean en efvo... Modo-->  no funciona.. M Pago--> no anda ...T crédito--> está caido el sistema

(Translated by Google)
I don't know why I keep going... they always have problems with payment methods other than cash... Mode--> doesn't work... M Payment--> doesn't work... T credit--> the system is down

reviews.comment:
Fui el domingo a las 14:20 a cargar nafta y el señor de camisa blanca dejo pasar antes q a mi a un auto que vino después q yo, cuqndo le comente que estaba yo antes me dijo “anda da la vueltita y volve” ni cargue nafta de lo mala onda que fue.

(Translated by Google)
I went on Sunday at 2:20 pm to fill up with gas and the man in the white shirt let a car that came after me go ahead of me. When I told him that I was there first, he said, "Go take a little walk and come back." I didn't even fill up with gas because of how rude he was.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURoMmFHbVpnEAE
